title: goeppertia cyclophora
intro: Goeppertia cyclophora, also known as Cyclophora goeppertia or sometimes referred to as the 'false calathea' or 'false prayer plant', is a species of flowering plant in the family Marantaceae. It is a medicinal plant used in traditional medicine due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Goeppertia cyclophora include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
